status: height: 50px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 28px 0 24px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600;
th-avatar: width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6C9BC9, #2E5C8F); flex-shrink: 0;
th-timer: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 3px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500;
sys-note: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 5px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 13px; padding: 4px 16px 14px; text-align: center;
b-meta: display: flex; gap: 4px; justify-content: flex-end; margin-top: 3px; font-size: 12px;
comp-pill: flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; border-radius: 18px; background: var(--surface);
send: width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--blue); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0;
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 3px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500;
